label: Molecular Generation
description: Generate synthesized analogs from natural compound scaffolds using generative AI.

defaultInputs.name: Compound List
defaultInputs.tooltip: Input list of natural compound SMILES to use as generation seeds.

defaultInputs.name: Target List
defaultInputs.tooltip: Protein targets for property optimization during generation.

defaultOutputs.name: QED Score
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Quantitative Estimate of Drug-likeness (0–1, higher is better).

configSchema.label: Seed SMILES
configSchema.tooltip: Comma-separated SMILES or map from compound list output.

configSchema.label: Generation Algorithm
configSchema.tooltip: Select the generative model. **MolMim** uses a continuous latent space to interpolate between natural scaffold and optimized drug-like analogs.

configSchema.label: Number of Generations
configSchema.tooltip: Number of analogs to generate per seed compound.

configSchema.label: Optimize For
configSchema.tooltip: Property objective for the generative optimization.
